name: Avalon Lakes Golf Course & Country Club
about: Avalon Lakes Golf Course & Country Club is a multi-location resort and country club complex in Northeast Ohio and Pennsylvania. It operates six distinct locations, including four championship golf courses (Avalon Lakes, Squaw Creek, Buhl Park, and Avalon Field Club), The Grand Resort hotel, and extensive amenities like restaurants, tennis, fitness centers, and a salon and spa. The venue is particularly known for its indoor golf center, which features high-end simulators allowing players to experience world-renowned courses. Membership is the primary access model, starting at $93 per month and providing access to all locations and amenities.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to multiple championship-level golf courses across six locations
Indoor golf center with top-tier simulators to play the world's top 50 courses
Comprehensive membership offering golf, dining, and resort amenities for one low price

food_and_drink.notes: On-site dining with 18 restaurants and bars ranging from casual to fine dining
Bars and restaurants on-site serving alcohol

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a policy on bringing your own clubs. It is recommended to contact them directly for details on simulator equipment policies.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has on-site restaurants and bars. For specific policies on outside food and drink, especially for private events, it is best to contact the venue directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for playing 18 holes on a simulator. Contact the Indoor Golf Center for more specific information.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Avalon offers dedicated amenities for children, including 'Kids at the Club' programs, making it a family-friendly environment.
